cookiesTip1.message: There are three types of cookies used on our website: mandatory, functional and third parties. You can choose whether to apply functionality and turn on third-party cookies. Click on the different cookie categories to learn more about each category and change the default settings.

cookiesTip2.message: Necessary cookies are necessary for basic website functionality. Some examples include: session cookies, authentication cookies, and security cookies required to transmit websites.

cookiesTip3.message: Functional cookies enhance the functionality, performance and services on the website. Some examples include: cookies used to analyze website traffic, cookies used for user research, and cookies used to display advertisements that are not targeted to a specific individual.

cookiesTip4.message: In addition to our own cookies, we may use various third-party cookies to report website usage statistics and optimize marketing efforts.

cookiesTip5.message: Track website behavior and link it with other metrics to better understand usage habits.

cookiesTip6.message: Allows real-time tracking of user conversions from different marketing channels to evaluate their effectiveness.

cookiesTip7.message: Provide marketing conversion metrics to our partners so they can optimize their paid marketing efforts.

cookiesSetting1.message: We use cookies to remember your login details, provide a secure login experience, and collect statistics to optimize website functionality.

cookiesSetting2.message: You can find a detailed description of the types of cookies we use in our Cookie Policy. Click "Agree" to accept all cookies or "Reject" to allow only necessary cookies. Click Cookies Settings to configure cookies in detail.

loginTipsMsg2.message: Hisobingizning xavfsizligini ta'minlash uchun, parolning yomon niyatli buzilishining oldini olish va hisobingizning xavfsizligini oshirish uchun kirish parolingizni o'zgartiring.

loginTipsMsg3.message: Sizning parolingiz juda oddiy. Hisobingizni himoya qilish uchun, parolingizni o'zgartiring.
